name: Client Operating Model Phase 10 Build Managed Runtime Accounting
outcome_goal: Implement optional managed runtime accounting and observability primitives: execution modes, metering, receipts, heartbeat health, audit views, customer-safe summaries, and tests.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not make managed runtime mandatory.
Do not invent billing/invoicing beyond transparent metering and cost visibility primitives.
Do not leak internal infrastructure identifiers into customer-facing summaries.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; Phase 11 owns final shared surface docs.

jobs.label: phase_10_managed_runtime_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 10 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_10_managed_runtime/PLAN.md. Implement optional managed/exported/hybrid runtime accounting primitives: execution mode model, metering records, usage summaries, run receipt model, pricing schedule version references, heartbeat/pool health summaries, internal audit contract, and customer-safe observability summaries. Preserve exported and hybrid paths. Add tests for mode selection, unsupported managed run fail-fast, metering idempotency, receipt finalization, cost schedule versioning, stale heartbeat health, and customer summary redaction. Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_10_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation, blockers, and Phase 11 surface needs. Do not stage or commit.
